zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joane Ashe於1413年出生在英國戴文阿申波頓時，她的父親Richard Ashe de Esse53歲，母親Anne Greer13歲。她於1439年與Richard Hals在英國戴文塔維斯托可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年在英國戴文布拉德利享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joane Ashe于1413年出生在英国戴文阿申波頓时，她的父亲Richard Ashe de Esse53岁，母亲Anne Greer13岁。她于1439年与Richard Hals在英国戴文塔維斯托可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年在英国戴文布拉德利享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Ashe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Ash   1, found mainly in Ireland.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , a variant of   Ash   2.

History: This is the name of a prominent NC family; John Baptist Ashe settled in NC before 1720. It is not known where he came from: his personal name suggests that he may have been of French extraction, perhaps originally named Jean-Baptiste Dufresne.

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joane Ashe was born in 1413, in Ashburton, Devon, England, her father, Richard Ashe de Esse, was 53 and her mother, Anne Greer, was 13. She married Richard Hals in 1439, in Tavistock, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1449, in Bradley, Devon, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joane Ashe est née en 1413, à Ashburton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Ashe d’Esse, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Anne Greer, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Hals en 1439, à Tavistock, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1449, à Bradley, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joane Ashe 1413 in Ashburton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Ashe de Esse 53 und ihre Mutter Anne Greer 13. Sie hat 1439 in Tavistock, Devon, England Richard Hals geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1449 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Bradley, Devon, England und wurde in Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joane Ashe è nata il nel 1413 nel Ashburton, Devon, England, sua padre, Richard Ashe de Esse, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Anne Greer, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Richard Hals nel 1439, nel Tavistock, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1449, nel Bradley, Devon, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joane Asheが1413年にイギリスデボンアシュブルトンで生まれた時，父Richard Ashe de Esseは53歳，母Anne Greerは13歳であった。1439年にイギリスデボンタヴィストックでRichard Halsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年にイギリスデボンブラドリーで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joane Ashe(이)가 1413년 영국 데폰 애쉬버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Ashe de Esse(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Greer(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1439년 영국 데폰 타비스톡에서 Richard Hals(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 데폰 브래들리에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joane Ashe nasceu em 1413, em Ashburton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Ashe de Esse, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Anne Greer, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Hals em 1439, em Tavistock, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1449, em Bradley, Devon, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joane Ashe родилась в 1413 г. в местности ашбуртон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Ashe de Esse было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Greer, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Hals в 1439 г. в местности тавистокк, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1449 г. в местности брадли, девон, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joane Ashe nació en 1413, en Ashburton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Ashe de Esse, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Anne Greer, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Richard Hals en 1439, en Tavistock, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1449, en Bradley, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
